headline: Higher NII & Loan Growth to Aid M&T Bank's Q2 Earnings Amid Cost Woes
summary: MTB's Q2 results, set to release on July 15, are expected to benefit from higher NII and loan growth, while elevated costs remain a concern.

raw.headline: Higher NII & Loan Growth to Aid M&T Bank's Q2 Earnings Amid Cost Woes

headline: PNC Financial's Q2 Earnings Coming Up: Here's What You Should Know
summary: PNC's Q2 results, scheduled to report on July 15, are expected to reflect higher revenues and earnings, supported by NII growth and FirstBank integration.

raw.headline: PNC Financial's Q2 Earnings Coming Up: Here's What You Should Know
raw.summary: PNC's Q2 results, scheduled to report on July 15, are expected to reflect higher revenues and earnings, supported by NII growth and FirstBank integration.

headline: Stay Ahead of the Game With U.S. Bancorp (USB) Q2 Earnings: Wall Street's Insights on Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for U.S. Bancorp (USB), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended June 2026.
